text.title: Stakeholder Analysis — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: identify-individuals
step.action: Extract every individual who can affect or is affected by the engagement.

step.name: classify-power-interest
step.action: Per individual: assess power (decision authority) × interest (project impact on them).

step.name: strategize-per-quadrant
step.action: Apply manage-closely / keep-satisfied / keep-informed / monitor per quadrant.

step.name: raci-per-decision
step.action: Per decision: name R, A, ≤5 C, all relevant I.
